basic_details.job_title: BMC Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 120 Fireman, Clerk and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Fireman, Fireman Driver, Sub Fire Officer, Senior Fireman, Fire Technician, Junior Clerk cum Junior Security Assistant, Asst. Senior Clerk cum Senior Security Assistant, Junior Operator, Legal Assistant, Assistant Programmer cum System Analyst, City Engineer, Gynecologist, Piki Phone (Field Worker)
basic_details.short_information: The Bhavnagar Municipal Corporation (BMC Bhavnagar) has officially announced the Various Posts Recruitment 2026 with 120 openings. The detailed notification was published on 02 May 2026 at https://ojas.gujarat.gov.in and https://www.bmcgujarat.com. Candidates who meet the age criteria as per Gujarat Government norms and hold qualifications ranging from HSC (12th Pass), ITI, Diploma, Graduate, B.E./B.Tech, MCA, LL.B., to MBBS/MD/MS depending on the post can now submit their online applications. The application process will be active from 10 May 2026 (02:00 PM) to 31 May 2026 (11:59 PM). Direct

important_dates.exam_date: To be announced later on OJAS website

application_fee.general_fee: As per OJAS / Gujarat Government prescribed fee (refer official notification)
application_fee.sc_fee: Fee concession applicable as per Gujarat Government rules
application_fee.payment_mode: Post Office only - last date 02/06/2026 up to 15:00 hrs
application_fee.details: The application fee must be deposited at the Post Office on or before 2nd June 2026 up to 15:00 hrs. Applications submitted without fee payment will be automatically rejected. Fee once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances. Unreserved (General) candidates who belong to economically weaker sections may be eligible for concession as per Gujarat Government norms.

age_limit.details: Age limit and relaxations are applicable as per Gujarat Government norms. Candidates belonging to unreserved (General) category shall get no age relaxation. Relaxation in upper age limit is provided to SC, ST, SEBC, EWS women, and PH (Divyang) candidates as per Gujarat Government rules. Candidates are advised to refer to the official OJAS notification for post-wise age limits.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the closing date of online application (31/05/2026). All qualifications must be from a Government Institute or Government-recognized/AICTE/UGC-recognized Institute. Knowledge of Gujarati is desirable for most posts. For physical standards applicable to Fire Department posts (Fireman, Fireman Driver, Sub Fire Officer etc.), candidates must refer to the detailed notification on the OJAS website. Candidates belonging to unreserved (General) category are eligible for fee concession and age relaxation as applicable under Gujarat Government rules. | Post-wise Educational Qualification | Note: Detailed educational qualification, pay scale, and other eligibility information are available on the OJAS website ojas.gujarat.gov.in and BMC website www.bmcgujarat.com.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Asst. Senior Clerk cum Senior Security Assistant
Junior Clerk cum Junior Security Assistant

salary_details.pay_scale: Post Office (last date 02/06/2026 up to 15:00 hrs)

selection_process: Stage 1 Merit-based Shortlisting - candidates shortlisted based on percentage of marks in qualifying examination by the Screening Committee All posts
Stage 2 Written Examination - objective multiple-choice type (MCQ); shortlisted candidates will be called for written exam All posts

Stage 3 Physical Efficiency / Endurance Test - physical fitness and endurance standards to be met Fire Department posts only (Fireman, Senior Fireman, Sub Fire Officer, Fireman Driver, Fire Technician)
Stage 4 Document Verification - candidates clearing written exam / physical test will be called for original document verification All shortlisted candidates

The selection process for BMC Recruitment 2026 consists of multiple stages as determined by the Selection Committee (Pasandgi Samiti). Candidates will first be shortlisted on the basis of academic merit
and document verification. Final selection will be merit-based. The Commissioner
reserves the right to modify the selection process as required.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the OJAS Gujarat portal at ojas.gujarat.gov.in. No offline, postal, or in-person applications will be accepted under any circumstances. The portal will be active from 10/05/2026 (14:00 hrs) to 31/05/2026 (23:59 hrs). Candidates are strongly advised to read the detailed notification carefully before applying. Candidates must ensure eligibility before submitting the online application - the qualification, pay scale, and all other information is available on the OJAS website and the BMC website www.bmcgujarat.com.
Visit the official OJAS Gujarat website: ojas.gujarat.gov.in
Search for the recruitment link for "Bhavnagar Mahanagarpalika – Various Posts Recruitment 2026"
Read the full notification carefully including eligibility, age limit, physical standards, and fee structure
Click on the "Apply Online" link and register with basic details (name, date of birth, mobile number, email ID)
Save the provisional registration number and password generated after registration
Log in and fill the online application form with personal, educational, category, and contact details
Upload scanned photograph and signature in the prescribed format
Deposit the application fee at the Post Office and enter the receipt/registration number in the application
Review all details carefully before final submission and submit online
Take a printout of the completed application and fee payment receipt for future reference
important_instructions: No application will be accepted through postal mail or in person - only online applications via OJAS portal will be considered. The fee must be deposited at the Post Office by 02/06/2026 (15:00 hrs) - applications submitted without fee payment will be rejected automatically. Candidates must fill the online application form only after reading the full detailed notification on OJAS website. Candidates from unreserved (General) class are eligible for fee, age, and other concessions as prescribed under Gujarat Government norms. SC, ST, SEBC, and EWS women, and Divyang (PH) candidate reservations are included as per Gujarat Government service rules. For fire department posts, candidates must meet prescribed physical fitness and endurance standards - details available on OJAS website. The selection process will be merit-based, conducted by the Screening/Selection Committee (Pasandgi Samiti). All decisions of the Commissioner, Bhavnagar Municipal Corporation regarding eligibility, selection, and all other matters are final and binding. Candidates are advised to regularly visit ojas.gujarat.gov.in and www.bmcgujarat.com for all updates related to this recruitment. For more information, candidates should visit the BMC website: www.bmcgujarat.com

faq.question: Q1. What is the BMC Bhavnagar Recruitment 2026 and how many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: Bhavnagar Municipal Corporation (Bhavnagar Mahanagarpalika) has released Advertisement No. માહિતી/ભાવ/52/2026 dated 02/05/2026 for recruitment to 120 posts under various cadres like Fire Service, Clerical, Technical, Engineering, Legal, and Medical. The recruitment covers 13 different posts including Fireman, Fireman Driver, Sub Fire Officer, Senior Fireman, Junior Clerk cum Junior Security Assistant, Junior Operator, City Engineer, Gynecologist, and others.

faq.question: Q2. What are the important dates for BMC Bhavnagar Various Posts Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The detailed notification was published on 02 May 2026 on the OJAS Gujarat and BMC Gujarat websites. The online application portal at OJAS (ojas.gujarat.gov.in) will be open from 10/05/2026 (2:00 PM) to 31/05/2026 (11:59 PM), and the last date for fee payment at the Post Office is 02/06/2026 up to 3:00 PM.

faq.question: Q3. Through which website can I apply online for BMC Bhavnagar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates have to submit applications online only through the OJAS Gujarat portal at ojas.gujarat.gov.in; no offline or postal applications will be accepted. The official Bhavnagar Municipal Corporation website bmcgujarat.com will also host the notification and related recruitment updates, but the application process itself is exclusively on OJAS.

faq.question: Q4. How many posts and which designations are included in the 120 vacancies?
faq.answer: The Bhavnagar Municipal Corporation Recruitment 2026 includes 120 total vacancies across 13 posts: Assistant Programmer cum System Analyst, Sub Fire Officer, Senior Fireman, Fireman (Male), Fireman cum Driver, Fire Technician, Legal Assistant, Assistant Senior Clerk cum Senior Security Assistant, Junior Clerk cum Junior Security Assistant, Junior Operator, City Engineer, Gynecologist, and Piki Phone (Field Worker). The largest share of posts is for Fireman (Male) and Fireman cum Driver under the Fire Department cadre.

faq.question: Q5. What are the basic educational qualifications required for different BMC Bhavnagar posts?
faq.answer: Educational qualifications range from HSC (12th Pass), ITI, Diploma, and Graduate degrees to professional degrees like B.E./B.Tech (Civil/Computer/IT), MCA, LL.B., and MBBS with MD/MS depending on the post. For example, Fireman/Fireman Driver require 12th pass with prescribed physical standards (and a valid heavy vehicle driving license for Driver), City Engineer requires B.E./B.Tech in Civil Engineering, Assistant Programmer cum System Analyst requires B.E./B.Tech (CS/IT) or MCA, Legal Assistant requires LL.B., and Gynecologist requires MBBS with MD/MS in Gynecology from a recognized medical institution.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit and age relaxation policy for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for each post and category is as per Gujarat Government service rules and is specified in the official OJAS notification for this advertisement. Upper age relaxation is available for SC, ST, SEBC, EWS women, PH (Divyang), and Ex-Servicemen candidates as per Gujarat Government norms, whereas unreserved (General) candidates have to adhere strictly to the prescribed post-wise age limits without relaxation.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for BMC Bhavnagar Recruitment 2026 and how do I pay it?
faq.answer: An application fee is applicable as per Gujarat Government and OJAS rules, and the exact fee amount for various categories is mentioned in the official notification. The fee must be paid only through the Post Office up to 02/06/2026 (3:00 PM); applications submitted without fee payment confirmation will be automatically rejected.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for BMC Bhavnagar Various Posts Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes merit-based shortlisting on academic percentage, followed by an objective type (MCQ) written examination for all posts, and a physical efficiency/endurance test for Fire Department posts like Fireman, Fireman Driver, Senior Fireman, Sub Fire Officer, and Fire Technician. Candidates who clear these stages will have to undergo document verification, and final selection will be purely on merit as decided by the Selection Committee and the Commissioner, Bhavnagar Municipal Corporation.
